meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Design with AI: The Freelancer's Guide to Scaling Apps
content.seo_description: Break past basic app limitations. This expert checklist teaches freelancers to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps that fail to impress. To transcend mediocrity, integrate AI-driven design workflows using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for intelligent, iterative implementation. This shift allows you to deliver high-fidelity, production-ready features in hours rather than weeks, effectively doubling your freelance output capacity.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the client project is stalling, your components look like generic boilerplate, and you are trapped in a cycle of writing repetitive CSS instead of solving real business problems. You are stuck in the 'basic app' purgatory, watching your competitors ship sleek, AI-enhanced experiences while you wrestle with layout bugs.

But the tide is turning. By leveraging AI-first design workflows, you can bypass the grunt work that keeps you from delivering premium value. This guide is your blueprint to weaponizing Antigravity and Claude Code, transforming your development stack into a high-velocity engine that turns raw requirements into polished, market-ready software.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, use AI to map your UI components and state management to prevent technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project requirement and generate a clean, modular component architecture using Tailwind and React.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Create a file structure based on the architectural plan generated in Antigravity.'

steps.title: Rapid UI Generation
steps.description: Use AI to generate high-fidelity UI layouts that adhere to modern design systems, saving hours of manual styling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar, top navigation, and data table using modern, minimalist aesthetics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Implement the dashboard layout using the specs provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Automated State Hook Implementation
steps.description: Generate robust logic for your components to ensure data flows correctly without boilerplate bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write custom React hooks for managing authentication state and API data fetching with error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Create the hook files and integrate them into the existing dashboard components.'

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Pass your codebase through Claude Code to identify inefficiencies and optimize for performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this component tree for unnecessary re-renders and suggest performance optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Refactor the project for better performance based on the analysis.'

steps.title: Production-Ready Deployment Prep
steps.description: Ensure your code is clean, documented, and ready for client hand-off using AI-assisted linting and docs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md and JSDoc comments for all exported functions in this project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Apply documentation and verify build success.'

pro_tips: Always define a 'Context File' at the root of your project; Claude Code performs 3x better when it has a clear project scope reference.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests before you write the logic; this forces the AI to consider edge cases early.
Never accept the first output; append 'Iterate and optimize for mobile-first responsiveness' to every prompt for higher quality.
Keep your Claude Code sessions focused on one module at a time to prevent context window dilution.
Commit your code after every AI-generated block to ensure you can revert to a 'known good' state if the AI hallucinates.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your testing and deployments, freeing up even more time for high-level architectural work.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the blueprint. Stop being a basic builder and start architecting the future of your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
